# ADR Number

ADR-XXX

# Title

Short decision title.

# Status

Proposed | Accepted | Superseded | Deprecated

# Context

Describe the problem, forces, and constraints behind the decision.
This can include agent architecture, model split, tool selection, data governance, or review workflow.

# Decision

State the chosen approach clearly and directly.
Include the operational rule, not just the preference.

# Alternatives Considered

- Alternative A and why it was not chosen
- Alternative B and why it was not chosen

# Consequences

- Expected benefits
- Known tradeoffs
- Operational or maintenance impact
- Audit or governance impact

# Follow-up Actions

- Required implementation tasks
- Required documentation updates
- Required validation or rollout steps
